prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan CA18DET (S13 Silvia/180SX engine code) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, Tomei 264° camshafts, and a Nismo 555cc top-mount fuel injector kit for a 350hp target at 1.5 bar boost on E85 fuel

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 70mm titanium tip, paired with a Tomei 4-2-1 header and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise turbo spool management

Nismo 5-speed close-ratio transmission with a OS Giken 1.5-way limited-slip differential, reinforced with a Cusco 2-way rear LSD and a Nismo clutch-type LSD for the front (if AWD conversion is applied)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (S12 Silvia-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Veilside Fortune front bumper and a custom rear diffuser by TRA Kyoto
Work Meister S1 3-piece wheels in 16x9.5 +15 front and 16x10.5 +20 rear, wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/50/16 and 245/45/16 tires, with custom extended wheel studs by ARP

Full custom interior by Bride with Zeta IV bucket seats, a Nismo S12-specific bolt-in roll cage, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a Defi BF gauge cluster in a custom carbon fiber dash panel
